projectTask: Dogfood ODW on this isolated Dogfood Taskboard CLI project. Evaluate CLI ergonomics, task storage, reports, tests, docs, failure modes, and whether ODW orchestration improves multi-agent evidence gathering over direct codexctl.

bambooTrials.label: bamboo-entry-high-qwen
bambooTrials.prompt: Act as a high-quality domestic-model entry planner. Inspect package.json, README.md, src/, and test/. Return a concise audit plan and note whether this model is a good entry planner. Do not edit files.

bambooTrials.label: bamboo-exec-low-qwen
bambooTrials.prompt: Act as a lower-cost domestic-model execution lane. Inspect src/ and test/ quickly. Return one low-risk issue candidate and one validation command. Do not edit files.

bambooTrials.label: bamboo-exit-high-kimi
bambooTrials.prompt: Act as a high-quality domestic-model exit reviewer. Inspect the repository and identify the top risk in letting cheaper execution agents produce changes. Do not edit files.
